class.name: ASStateUtils
class.brief_description: Utility functions for state management and serialization.
class.description:
ASStateUtils provides a comprehensive set of utility functions for working with [ASStateSnapshot] objects. Includes state comparison, serialization, compression, validation, and debugging capabilities.
These utilities are designed to support advanced features like: - Network optimization through state diffing and compression - Save/load system integration with binary serialization - Debugging and validation tools for state integrity - State analysis and comparison for testing
All functions are static and can be called without instantiation.

method.name: compare_states
method.description: Performs deep equality comparison between two state snapshots.

method.name: compress_state
method.description: Compresses a state snapshot using compression algorithms. Significantly reduces data size for network bandwidth optimization.

method.name: compute_state_difference
method.description: Computes a numerical difference score between two snapshots. Higher values indicate greater differences. Useful for state change detection.

method.name: decompress_state
method.description: Decompresses state snapshot data created by compress_state().

method.name: deserialize_state
method.description: Deserializes a state snapshot from binary data created by serialize_state().

method.name: dump_state
method.description: Prints detailed state information to the console for debugging.

method.name: get_validation_errors
method.description: Returns an array of validation error messages for a state snapshot. Empty array indicates no validation errors found.

method.name: serialize_state
method.description: Serializes a state snapshot to compact binary format. Optimized for network transmission and file storage.

method.name: state_to_string
method.description: Returns a compact string representation of the state snapshot. Useful for logging and quick state identification.

method.name: validate_state
method.description: Validates the integrity and consistency of a state snapshot. Checks for invalid data, corrupted values, and logical inconsistencies.
